mechanics.excerpt: Electronics: Includes tar geting systems computers and control systems for most modern components_ Fusion: Fusion engines including extra light (XL), for ground-based vehicles and aero space fighters_ ICE: Internal combustion engines for ground vehicles_ Interplanetary: Large reaction dri- ves found DropShips and WarShips including the fusion engines that power them; Jet: Jet-drive systems including fighter engines and BattleMech jump jets Jump Drive: KF jump drive systems_ including Iithium-fusion batteries_ Lasers: Laser weapon systems including pulse laser and PPC weapon systems_ Mechanics: Includes internal struc turc; armor and ground vehicle drive systems Missile: Includes missile and missile artillery weapon systems Myomer: BattleMech and battle armor musculature_ including actua tors Tactics Subskills The Tactics Subskills are based on the various theaters ofbattle in the thirty-first century; summa rized below: Alr: Combat in the atmosphere of a planet; whether in aerospace conventional fighters_ DropShips and VTOLs when used conjunction with air forces 'Mech: Any combat involving BattleMechs in any environment; Infantry: Combat involving con- ventional and/or battle-armored Intantry: Space: Combat in space_ includ" aerospace fighters, DropShips_ JumpShips and WarShips Ground: Vehicular combat land, including tank, hovercraft and Wheeled vehicles well VTOLs wen used conjunction with ground forces_ Naval: Vehicular combat on the surface and underwater; including conventional naval vessels hydrofoils and submarines_ TECHNICIAN" The Technician Subskills cover the repair, maintenance and construc ton of all types of mechanical and technological devices, including com- bat vehicles and weapons Technicians need wide range of subskills depending the types things they build and repair Each skill area covers certain group of compo 107
